_comment: IPC classification seed — sections (8) + top-50 subclasses by corpus frequency. Standard IPC titles (WIPO scheme); Turkish translations follow common Turkish IP usage. Loader: scripts/seed_ipc_classes.py.
_source: WIPO IPC scheme + corpus frequency analysis (top subclasses from patents.ipc_classes as of 2026-05-10)
